title: carex breviglumis
intro: Carex breviglumis, also known as the broad-leaved sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex breviglumis include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. Carex breviglumis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
